001package guiDiscussion;
002
003import entityClasses.User;
004import javafx.geometry.Insets;
005import javafx.geometry.Pos;
006import javafx.scene.Scene;
007import javafx.scene.control.Alert;
008import javafx.scene.control.Button;
009import javafx.scene.control.Label;
010import javafx.scene.control.Separator;
011import javafx.scene.control.TextArea;
012import javafx.scene.control.TextField;
013import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane;
014import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints;
015import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane;
016import javafx.scene.layout.HBox;
017import javafx.scene.layout.Priority;
018import javafx.scene.layout.Region;
019import javafx.scene.layout.VBox;
020import javafx.scene.text.Font;
021import javafx.stage.Stage;
022
023/**
024 * View for the discussion board GUI.
025 *
026 * <p>This class defines and lays out the widgets used by students, staff, and admins to
027 * interact with discussion posts and replies. The view delegates user actions to the controller
028 * and displays formatted output returned by the model/service layers.
029 *
030 * <p>Students User Story alignment: create post, update post, read all posts, keyword search,
031 * create reply, and list replies for a specific post.
032 *
033 * @author TP2 Team
034 * @version 1.00 2026-03-18 MVC documentation update
035 */
036public class ViewDiscussionBoard {
037
038        private static double width = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_WIDTH;
039        private static double height = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_HEIGHT;
040
041        /** Application stage used to render the discussion board scene. */
042        protected static Stage theStage;
043        /** Active user interacting with the discussion board. */
044        protected static User theUser;
045        /** Role id used for return navigation to the correct home page. */
046        protected static int returnRole;
047
048        private static ViewDiscussionBoard theView;
049        private static BorderPane theRootPane;
050        private static Scene theDiscussionScene;
051
052        private static Label label_PageTitle = new Label("Discussion Board (Ed-Style)");
053        private static Label label_User = new Label();
054        private static Label label_Role = new Label();
055
056        /** Input field for creating/updating post title selection. */
057        protected static TextField text_PostTitle = new TextField();
058        /** Optional field for replacing an existing post title. */
059        protected static TextField text_UpdateTitle = new TextField();
060        /** Keyword input used for subset filtering of posts. */
061        protected static TextField text_SearchKeyword = new TextField();
062        /** Input area for post body content. */
063        protected static TextArea text_PostBody = new TextArea();
064        /** Output area for formatted post/reply listing results. */
065        protected static TextArea text_PostOutput = new TextArea();
066
067        /** Input field naming the post title to reply to. */
068        protected static TextField text_ReplyPostTitle = new TextField();
069        /** Input area for reply body content. */
070        protected static TextArea text_ReplyBody = new TextArea();
071        private static Label label_ReplyHelp = new Label("Reply to this post: type the title, then your reply body below.");
072
073        private static Button button_CreatePost = new Button("Create Post");
074        private static Button button_UpdatePost = new Button("Update Post");
075        private static Button button_DeletePost = new Button("Delete Post");
076        private static Button button_ShowPosts = new Button("Show All Posts");
077        private static Button button_SearchKeyword = new Button("Search Keyword");
078
079        private static Button button_CreateReply = new Button("Create Reply");
080        private static Button button_ShowRepliesForPost = new Button("Replies For Post");
081
082        private static Button button_Return = new Button("Return");
083
084        private static Alert alertError = new Alert(Alert.AlertType.INFORMATION);
085
086        /**
087         * Displays the discussion board scene for the active user.
088         *
089         * @param ps application stage
090         * @param user active logged-in user
091         * @param roleToReturn role id for return navigation (1=admin, 2=student, else=staff)
092         */
093        public static void displayDiscussionBoard(Stage ps, User user, int roleToReturn) {
094                theStage = ps;
095                theUser = user;
096                returnRole = roleToReturn;
097
098                if (theView == null) {
099                        theView = new ViewDiscussionBoard();
100                }
101
102                label_User.setText("User: " + user.getUserName());
103                label_Role.setText("Role: " + ViewDiscussionBoard.getRoleLabel(user));
104                ControllerDiscussionBoard.showAllPosts();
105                label_ReplyHelp.setText("Reply to this post: type the title, then your reply body below.");
106                button_DeletePost.setVisible(user.getAdminRole() || user.getStaffRole());
107
108                theStage.setTitle("CSE 360 Foundations: Discussion Board");
109                theStage.setScene(theDiscussionScene);
110                theStage.setMaximized(true);
111                theStage.show();
112        }
113
114        /**
115         * Builds the discussion board scene and initializes static UI widgets once.
116         */
117        private ViewDiscussionBoard() {
118                theRootPane = new BorderPane();
119                theRootPane.setPadding(new Insets(16));
120                theDiscussionScene = new Scene(theRootPane, width, height);
121
122                VBox headerBox = new VBox(4);
123                headerBox.getChildren().addAll(label_PageTitle, label_User, label_Role);
124
125                GridPane postFormGrid = new GridPane();
126                postFormGrid.setHgap(8);
127                postFormGrid.setVgap(8);
128                ColumnConstraints labelCol = new ColumnConstraints();
129                labelCol.setMinWidth(130);
130                ColumnConstraints fieldCol = new ColumnConstraints();
131                fieldCol.setHgrow(Priority.ALWAYS);
132                postFormGrid.getColumnConstraints().addAll(labelCol, fieldCol);
133
134                Label labelTitle = new Label("Title:");
135                Label labelNewTitle = new Label("New Title (optional):");
136                Label labelBody = new Label("Post Body:");
137
138                setupLabel(label_PageTitle, 28, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
139                setupLabel(label_User, 18, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
140                setupLabel(label_Role, 16, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
141                setupLabel(labelTitle, 14, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
142                setupLabel(labelNewTitle, 12, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
143                setupLabel(labelBody, 12, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
144
145                setupField(text_PostTitle, "Unique post title");
146                setupField(text_UpdateTitle, "Leave empty to keep title");
147                setupArea(text_PostBody, 120, "Post body");
148
149                postFormGrid.add(labelTitle, 0, 0);
150                postFormGrid.add(text_PostTitle, 1, 0);
151                postFormGrid.add(labelNewTitle, 0, 1);
152                postFormGrid.add(text_UpdateTitle, 1, 1);
153                postFormGrid.add(labelBody, 0, 2);
154                postFormGrid.add(text_PostBody, 1, 2);
155
156                HBox postActions = new HBox(10);
157                setupButton(button_CreatePost, 120, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.createPost());
158                setupButton(button_UpdatePost, 120, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.updatePost());
159                setupButton(button_DeletePost, 120, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.deletePost());
160                setupButton(button_ShowPosts, 120, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.showAllPosts());
161                postActions.getChildren().addAll(button_CreatePost, button_UpdatePost, button_DeletePost, button_ShowPosts);
162
163                Label labelKeyword = new Label("Keyword:");
164                setupLabel(labelKeyword, 14, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
165                setupField(text_SearchKeyword, "search text");
166                setupButton(button_SearchKeyword, 140, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.searchPostsByKeyword());
167
168                HBox searchRow = new HBox(8);
169                searchRow.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
170                searchRow.getChildren().addAll(labelKeyword, text_SearchKeyword, button_SearchKeyword);
171                HBox.setHgrow(text_SearchKeyword, Priority.ALWAYS);
172
173                Label labelReplyTitle = new Label("Reply To Title:");
174                Label labelReplyBody = new Label("Reply Body:");
175                setupLabel(labelReplyTitle, 14, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
176                setupLabel(label_ReplyHelp, 12, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
177                setupLabel(labelReplyBody, 12, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
178
179                setupField(text_ReplyPostTitle, "Exact post title");
180                setupArea(text_ReplyBody, 110, "Reply body");
181
182                GridPane replyFormGrid = new GridPane();
183                replyFormGrid.setHgap(8);
184                replyFormGrid.setVgap(8);
185                ColumnConstraints replyLabelCol = new ColumnConstraints();
186                replyLabelCol.setMinWidth(130);
187                ColumnConstraints replyFieldCol = new ColumnConstraints();
188                replyFieldCol.setHgrow(Priority.ALWAYS);
189                replyFormGrid.getColumnConstraints().addAll(replyLabelCol, replyFieldCol);
190
191                replyFormGrid.add(labelReplyTitle, 0, 0);
192                replyFormGrid.add(text_ReplyPostTitle, 1, 0);
193                replyFormGrid.add(label_ReplyHelp, 1, 1);
194                replyFormGrid.add(labelReplyBody, 0, 2);
195                replyFormGrid.add(text_ReplyBody, 1, 2);
196
197                HBox replyActions = new HBox(10);
198                setupButton(button_CreateReply, 150, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.createReply());
199                setupButton(button_ShowRepliesForPost, 150, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.listRepliesForPost());
200                replyActions.getChildren().addAll(button_CreateReply, button_ShowRepliesForPost);
201
202                VBox leftColumn = new VBox(12);
203                leftColumn.getChildren().addAll(
204                        headerBox,
205                        new Separator(),
206                        postFormGrid,
207                        postActions,
208                        searchRow,
209                        new Separator(),
210                        replyFormGrid,
211                        replyActions
212                );
213                leftColumn.setPadding(new Insets(0, 12, 0, 0));
214
215                setupArea(text_PostOutput, 0, "");
216                text_PostOutput.setEditable(false);
217
218                Label outputLabel = new Label("Posts and Replies");
219                setupLabel(outputLabel, 14, Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
220
221                VBox outputColumn = new VBox(8);
222                outputColumn.getChildren().addAll(outputLabel, text_PostOutput);
223                VBox.setVgrow(text_PostOutput, Priority.ALWAYS);
224
225                Region spacer = new Region();
226                HBox.setHgrow(spacer, Priority.ALWAYS);
227                setupButton(button_Return, 120, (_) -> ControllerDiscussionBoard.performReturn());
228
229                HBox footer = new HBox(10);
230                footer.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
231                footer.getChildren().addAll(spacer, button_Return);
232
233                theRootPane.setLeft(leftColumn);
234                theRootPane.setCenter(outputColumn);
235                theRootPane.setBottom(footer);
236                BorderPane.setMargin(outputColumn, new Insets(0, 0, 0, 8));
237                BorderPane.setMargin(footer, new Insets(12, 0, 0, 0));
238
239                text_PostTitle.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
240                text_UpdateTitle.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
241                text_SearchKeyword.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
242                text_ReplyPostTitle.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
243                text_PostBody.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
244                text_ReplyBody.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
245                text_PostOutput.setMaxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE);
246                text_PostOutput.setMaxHeight(Double.MAX_VALUE);
247
248                alertError.setTitle("Discussion Error");
249                alertError.setHeaderText(null);
250        }
251
252        /**
253         * Converts role flags to a user-facing role label.
254         *
255         * @param user active user
256         * @return Admin, Staff, or Student
257         */
258        private static String getRoleLabel(User user) {
259                if (user.getAdminRole()) {
260                        return "Admin";
261                }
262                if (user.getStaffRole()) {
263                        return "Staff";
264                }
265                return "Student";
266        }
267
268        /**
269         * Shows an error/information dialog with the provided message.
270         *
271         * @param message message to display
272         */
273        protected static void showError(String message) {
274                alertError.setContentText(message);
275                alertError.showAndWait();
276        }
277
278        /**
279         * Helper that applies common label formatting and placement.
280         */
281        private void setupLabel(Label label, double fontSize, Pos alignment) {
282                label.setFont(Font.font("Arial", fontSize));
283                label.setAlignment(alignment);
284        }
285
286        /**
287         * Helper that applies common text field formatting and placement.
288         */
289        private void setupField(TextField field, String prompt) {
290                field.setMinWidth(200);
291                field.setPromptText(prompt);
292        }
293
294        /**
295         * Helper that applies common text area formatting and placement.
296         */
297        private void setupArea(TextArea area, double minHeight, String prompt) {
298                area.setMinHeight(minHeight);
299                area.setPrefHeight(minHeight);
300                area.setPromptText(prompt);
301                area.setWrapText(true);
302        }
303
304        /**
305         * Helper that applies common button formatting, placement, and action handler.
306         */
307        private void setupButton(Button button, double width,
308                                javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> handler) {
309                button.setMinWidth(width);
310                button.setOnAction(handler);
311        }
312}
